# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

interface ModuleConfig {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  enabled: boolean;
}

interface LoadedModule {
  name: string;
  module: any;
  handler?: (req: Request) => Promise<Response> | Response;
}

const loadedModules: Map<string, LoadedModule> = new Map();

function parseModuleConfig(configString: string): ModuleConfig[] {
  try {
    return JSON.parse(configString);
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function getModuleConfigsFromEnv(): ModuleConfig[] {
  const moduleConfigStr = Deno.env.get("MODULE_CONFIG");
  if (!moduleConfigStr) return [];
  return parseModuleConfig(moduleConfigStr);
}

function getModuleConfigsFromQuery(url: URL): ModuleConfig[] {
  const moduleConfigStr = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  if (!moduleConfigStr) return [];
  return parseModuleConfig(moduleConfigStr);
}

async function loadModule(config: ModuleConfig): Promise<LoadedModule | null> {
  if (!config.enabled) return null;

  try {
    const module = await import(config.path);
    const loadedModule: LoadedModule = {
      name: config.name,
      module: module,
      handler: module.default || module.handler,
    };
    return loadedModule;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load module ${config.name} from ${config.path}:`, error);
    return null;
  }
}

async function loadModules(configs: ModuleConfig[]): Promise<void> {
  for (const config of configs) {
    if (loadedModules.has(config.name)) continue;

    const loadedModule = await loadModule(config);
    if (loadedModule) {
      loadedModules.set(config.name, loadedModule);
    }
  }
}

async function executeModuleHandler(
  moduleName: string,
  req: Request
): Promise<Response | null> {
  const loadedModule = loadedModules.get(moduleName);
  if (!loadedModule || !loadedModule.handler) return null;

  try {
    return await loadedModule.handler(req);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error executing module ${moduleName}:`, error);
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: `Module ${moduleName} execution failed` }),
      { status: 500, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  if (pathname === "/") {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: "Dynamic Module Loader",
        endpoints: {
          "/": "This help message",
          "/modules": "List loaded modules",
          "/load": "Load modules from query parameter",
          "/execute/:moduleName": "Execute a specific module handler",
          "/reload": "Reload all modules from environment",
        },
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === "/modules") {
    const moduleList = Array.from(loadedModules.entries()).map(([name, mod]) => ({
      name,
      hasHandler: !!mod.handler,
      exports: Object.keys(mod.module),
    }));

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ modules: moduleList }), {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (pathname === "/load") {
    const queryConfigs = getModuleConfigsFromQuery(url);
    if (queryConfigs.length === 0) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: "No module configuration provided in query parameter" }),
        { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    await loadModules(queryConfigs);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: "Modules loaded",
        loaded: Array.from(loadedModules.keys()),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  if (pathname === "/reload") {
    loadedModules.clear();
    const envConfigs = getModuleConfigsFromEnv();
    await loadModules(envConfigs);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: "Modules reloaded from environment",
        loaded: Array.from(loadedModules.keys()),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  if (pathname.startsWith("/execute/")) {
    const moduleName = pathname.substring(9);
    if (!moduleName) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: "Module name required" }),
        { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    const response = await executeModuleHandler(moduleName, req);
    if (response) return response;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: `Module ${moduleName} not found or has no handler` }),
      { status: 404, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  if (pathname.startsWith("/call/")) {
    const parts = pathname.substring(6).split("/");
    const moduleName = parts[0];
    const functionName = parts[1] || "default";

    const loadedModule = loadedModules.get(moduleName);
    if (!loadedModule) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: `Module ${moduleName} not found` }),
        { status: 404, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    const func = loadedModule.module[functionName];
    if (typeof func !== "function") {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: `Function ${functionName} not found in module ${moduleName}` }),
        { status: 404, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    try {
      let body = null;
      if (req.method === "POST" || req.method === "PUT") {
        const contentType = req.headers.get("content-type");
        if (contentType?.includes("application/json")) {
          body = await req.json();
        } else {
          body = await req.text();
        }
      }

      const result = await func(req, body);
      
      if (result instanceof Response) {
        return result;
      }

      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ result }), {
        status: 200,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: `Function execution failed: ${error.message}` }),
        { status: 500, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
    status: 404,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function main() {
  const envConfigs = getModuleConfigsFromEnv();
  await loadModules(envConfigs);

  console.log(`Loaded ${loadedModules.size} modules from environment`);
  console.log("Modules:", Array.from(loadedModules.keys()));

  await serve(handleRequest, { port: 8000 });
}

main();
